---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability, CLI command, model adapter, or behaviour you want.
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today? Or: what's painful enough that the workaround isn't tolerable? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Concrete shape. CLI command, config field, behaviour change. Sketch the API if applicable. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What you tried first, why it didn't work, why this approach is better. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix in disguise (small)
- [ ] New CLI command or flag (medium)
- [ ] New module / new model adapter (medium)
- [ ] Wire-protocol change (large — needs MMP spec coordination)
- [ ] Other:

## Risk / blast radius

<!-- Who could this break? Existing operators? Existing scenarios? Mixed-version interop? -->
